summary: campaign-C Task 3 (capacity-pvi restructure) PASS (8/10, almost) at round 1. Split docs/html/resid-capacity-pvi.html along the probe/surface boundary: (1) relocated the measured input-DP tables + the depth-decoupling finding into docs/html/resid-dp-attacks.html as block R7 (representation-space tracking ρ; input-DP-by-depth ρ +0.96 L0 → −0.21 L20; per-ε L0 sample), every number diffed against refine-logs/resid-capacity-pvi/RESULTS_STANDARDIZED.md with none changed (3.85e3→3850 etc. identical); (2) staged the V_cap probe methodology — estimator-repair table, accuracy-vs-bits rationale, Lemma 1 / Prop 2 / Prop 3 — to refine-logs/capacity-pvi-restructure/VCAP-PROBE-PAGE-CONTENT.md for Task 4; (3) retired resid-capacity-pvi.html to an off-nav stub linking probes-registry.html + resid-dp-attacks.html (probe-vcap.html named in prose, not yet hyperlinked); (4) cited claim:depth-decoupling-input-dp from R7 + §06 + footer; (5) repointed the synthesis V_cap overview row to resid-dp-attacks.html#results. Reviewer verified numerical integrity (only the L0 +0.96/+0.99 tie-handling note flagged — fixed in caption), no lost content, honest R5↔R7 reconciliation, valid HTML. Cleanup pass (humanize/proofread/term-audit) run on edited pages. No GPU, no new claim.
